security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https:; img-src 'self' https: data: blob:; media-src 'self' https: data: blob:; frame-src https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https:

bundle.longDescription: A Tauri desktop anime metadata browser with local sessions, playlists, watch history, and VHS-inspired UI.
